subject: Re: How to process tilt series colllected with serial EM
body:
I agree that this would be super useful. Any update how how we should 
generate a tomostar file?

Many thanks

Andrea

On Thursday, October 4, 2018 at 4:10:11 PM UTC+1, Gregory Alushin wrote:
>
> Hello-
>
> I am interested in testing out Warp's tomography features.  I am wondering 
> what format the data / metadata needs to be in to be recognized by Warp.  
> Currently, I have compressed tif movies for each tilt, a gain reference, 
> and a serialEM mdoc file.  I noticed there is a "tomoSTAR" option for the 
> input: what is this?  Can you provide an example if it is something 
> analogous to a plain-text .star file?  Or will the documentation be online 
> soon (currently blank on the website)?
>
> Also, I will say that the CTF estimates just from the tifs considered as 
> independent FOVs are quite reasonable looking... so is it worth it to use 
> the tilt series CTF estimation?
>
> Thanks very much,
> -Greg Alushin
>
>
